description: Connects the Laporta master integrals (PHYS-46 independence program) to the QED alpha extraction chain through numerical perturbation analysis. Each Laporta constant is perturbed by epsilon, the A4 coefficient is shifted accordingly, and the resulting change in alpha_inv is computed by Newton re-inversion. This quantifies how much each potentially new constant contributes to the most precisely measured quantity in physics.
thesis: The six Laporta master integrals contribute to a_e at the 10^-11 level through the A4 coefficient. Each integral's sensitivity to alpha_inv is quantified by numerical perturbation. The total four-loop contribution shifts alpha_inv by order 1 ppb, which is at or just above the Harvard measurement precision.
